allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Id 14120 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8787 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort,OwningProcess")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8787 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $_ | Add-Member -NotePropertyName 'ProcessName' -NotePropertyValue \(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Name -PassThru } | Select-Object LocalPort,State,OwningProcess,ProcessName")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "cd 'C:\\Users\\-\\Desktop\\Multi-Agent'; \\$p = Start-Process -FilePath 'node' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\\Users\\-\\Desktop\\Multi-Agent' -WindowStyle Hidden -ArgumentList 'packages/api/dist/index.js' -PassThru; Set-Content -Path '.runtime\\api.pid' -Value \\$p.Id; Write-Host \('API started PID ' + \\$p.Id\)")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "
\\$p = Start-Process -FilePath 'node' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\\Users\\-\\Desktop\\Multi-Agent' -WindowStyle Hidden -ArgumentList 'packages/api/dist/index.js' -PassThru
\\$p.Id | Out-File 'C:\\Users\\-\\Desktop\\Multi-Agent\\.runtime\\api.pid' -Encoding ascii
'API PID: ' + \\$p.Id
")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "
Stop-Process -Id \(Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\-\\Desktop\\Multi-Agent\\.runtime\\api.pid'\) -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
netstat -ano | findstr ':8787 ' | ForEach-Object { \\$pid = \(\\$_ -split '\\s+'\)[5]; if\(\\$pid\) { Stop-Process -Id \\$pid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }
Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500
\\$p = Start-Process -FilePath 'node' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\\Users\\-\\Desktop\\Multi-Agent' -WindowStyle Hidden -ArgumentList 'packages/api/dist/index.js' -PassThru
\\$p.Id | Out-File 'C:\\Users\\-\\Desktop\\Multi-Agent\\.runtime\\api.pid' -Encoding ascii
Start-Sleep -Seconds 2
try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing 'http://localhost:8787/health' -TimeoutSec 3\).Content } catch { 'not up yet' }
")
